channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Concerns raised over perceived politicization of Canada’s judicial appointment process
item.description: In this opinion piece, lawyer Collin May argues that Canada’s judicial appointment system has become increasingly politicized and lacks transparency, particularly through the role of judicial advisory...

item.title: DCI Reveals How RIAT Student Rose Benter Apondi Was Brutally Killed by Ex-Boyfriend in Kisumu
item.description: Detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) in Kisumu have released shocking details surrounding the murder of 21-year-old Rose Benter Apondi, a student at Ramogi Institute of Adv...

item.title: Several iconic British musicians join the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame in a landmark year
item.description: This year's Rock & Roll Hall of Fame ceremony is set to make history with an unprecedented number of British artists among the new inductees. The official announcement highlights the enduring global i...

item.title: Tanzania prepares for Slovak Foreign Minister visit to boost diplomatic and economic cooperation
item.description: Today, April 14, 2026, in Dar es Salaam, the Slovak Ambassador to Tanzania, Ivan Lančarič, had a meeting with Ellen Maduhu, Acting Director of the Europe and Americas Department in the Ministry of For...

item.title: Amherst, N.S. man fatally shot in local incident
item.description: Authorities in Amherst, Nova Scotia, are investigating after a man was found dead following a shooting incident. The police have confirmed that the circumstances surrounding the death are suspicious, ...

item.title: French Government Considers Blocking Kanye West Concert in Marseille Over Antisemitic Remarks
item.description: The French government dey look to stop US rapper Kanye West from performing for Marseille because of him antisemitic comments. Interior Minister Laurent Nunez dey determined to block the June 11 conce...

item.title: Boat carrying Rohingya and Bangladeshis capsizes in Andaman Sea, hundreds missing
item.description: Around 250 people, including women and children, are feared missing after a trawler carrying Rohingya refugees and Bangladeshi nationals capsized in the Andaman Sea. The boat had departed from Teknaf,...

item.title: Couple arrested, 1 kilo of shabu seized in Maguindanao del Norte anti-drug operation
item.description: Authorities in Maguindanao del Norte arrested a married couple after a successful anti-narcotics entrapment operation that led to the seizure of around one kilogram of suspected shabu. The operation t...

item.title: EPRA Set to Reveal Updated Fuel Prices Amid Domestic Fuel Scandal and Global Oil Tensions
item.description: Nairobi — The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) is expected to announce new fuel prices today, as Kenyans brace for adjustments amid both local and international pressures. This comes a...

item.title: Revealing the Truth Behind the 1993 World Open Chess Cheating Mystery
item.description: The article investigates the long-unsolved 1993 “Von Neumann incident” at the World Open chess tournament in Philadelphia, where a disguised player entered under the name of mathematician John von Neu...

item.title: Strategies for reforming NDIS to manage costs and improve outcomes
item.description: Australia’s National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), supporting over 760,000 Australians with disabilities, is facing rapidly escalating costs, projected to exceed A$50 billion this year. Initiall...

item.title: Medicaid enrollment changes after COVID-19 and the role of state policies in coverage losses during the unwinding
item.description: During the COVID-19 pandemic, Medicaid enrollment in the United States increased significantly due to emergency policies that temporarily halted routine disenrollments. The Families First Coronavirus ...

item.title: Trump praises Pakistan’s Field Marshal Munir over role in US-Iran dialogue facilitation
item.description: US President Donald Trump has once again publicly praised Pakistan’s Chief of Defence Forces and Army Chief, Field Marshal Asim Munir, describing him as a “fantastic” military leader who is playing an...

item.title: Kenya's Preparations for 2027 Elections: Legal, Financial, and Administrative Challenges
item.description: Kenya is gearing up for the 2027 General Election, but the country's readiness is being tested far beyond polling stations. The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) is under scrutiny...

item.title: South African universities address governance challenges and institutional capture
item.description: South Africa’s public universities are facing a growing governance challenge as institutional capture increasingly threatens their integrity. Institutional capture occurs when decision-making, governa...

item.title: Study highlights infrastructure and financing challenges delaying PM-KUSUM solar irrigation rollout in India
item.description: A recent analysis has found that India’s PM-KUSUM scheme, aimed at expanding solar energy use in agriculture, has faced significant delays due to structural and financial challenges. The programme, la...

item.title: Senior military figures warn UK armed forces are underfunded and unprepared amid growing security threats
item.description: Senior British defence figures have issued stark warnings about the state of the UK’s armed forces, arguing they are underfunded and ill-prepared for modern global threats. Former NATO secretary gener...

item.title: Jane Krakowski on her career in television and theatre
item.description: Jane Krakowski reflects on her prolific career across television and theatre, highlighting her roles in landmark series such as Ally McBeal, 30 Rock, and Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt. From 1997 to 2002, ...

item.title: Australia faces growing debate over immigration policy and social cohesion
item.description: Australians are increasingly calling for an honest and open discussion about immigration. Historically, the country embraced multiculturalism and took pride in being a tolerant society that respected ...

item.title: Instacart Buys Colombia’s Instaleap to Grow Its Enterprise Tech Globally
item.description: Instacart announced its acquisition of Instaleap, a Colombia-based grocery technology company, as part of its broader strategy to expand its enterprise platform across international markets. Founded i...
